description: Implement VS Code integration: Create pkg/vscode/vscode.go with function OpenInVSCode(worktreePath string) error that opens a worktree in VS Code. Use 'code' command with worktree path. Handle errors if VS Code not installed. Integrate this into TUI (when 'o' pressed or Enter on worktree). Should work on macOS by running 'code <path>'.
note: Updated with prerequisites and file references
acceptance_criteria: Function uses exec.Command to run: code <worktreePath>
Returns descriptive error if code command not found in PATH
TUI model.go Update method calls OpenInVSCode when o or Enter pressed on worktree
TUI displays error message if VS Code fails to open

verification.value: Select worktree and press o or Enter, verify VS Code opens that directory
